title: Son of Zorro
director: Spencer Gordon Bennet, Fred C. Brannon
writer: Franklin Adreon, Basil Dickey, Jesse Duffy
actors: George Turner, Peggy Stewart, Roy Barcroft
plot: Young cavalry officer Jeff Stewart returns to his home in the west after the Civil War to find that a ring of crooked politicians has taken over the county, bleeding the citizens with 50% of value on the main trail, and protecting...
